name: @engi/mock-scripts
description: Easy setup and validation scripts for the Engi Mock System

scripts.help:
node -e "console.log('
🎭 Engi Mock System Scripts

Available commands:
  npm run setup [scenario]  - Set up mock system
  npm run validate          - Validate configuration
  npm run help              - Show this help

Scenarios: demo, enterprise, testing, onboarding, empty
');"

author: Engi Team
